visa_type_detail.general_description: This preference is reserved for persons who are members of the professions holding advanced degrees or for persons with exceptional ability in the arts, sciences, or business.
visa_type_detail.individual_labor_certification_required: Yes, unless the Form I-140 petition is accompanied by an application for Schedule A designation or a request for a national interest waiver.

visa_type_detail.general_description: This preference is reserved for professionals, skilled workers, and other workers. (See Third Preference EB-3 page for further definition of these job classifications.)
visa_type_detail.individual_labor_certification_required: Yes, unless the Form I-140 petition is accompanied by an application for Schedule A designation.

essential_apps.description: Manage your Social Security benefits and personal information.
Access your medical records, schedule appointments, and communicate with your doctor.
Real-time public transportation information for many cities.
Send and receive money between bank accounts easily.
Widely used for online payments and money transfers.
